creator: johans@FreeBSD.org
text:
This should be a non fatal message. The build script tries to compile and run different programs to establish or guess the CPU speed. If one fails, it just moves on to the next one. On my system, the first 6 programs fail for various reasons (including this error), but x86estimate works.

If this is a fatal error in your case, then something else is wrong. Could you attach the full build log?
